name: Crook
description: Grew up light-fingered in Badurga's alleys.

name: Soldier
description: Served a tour under some banner that mattered once.

name: Scholar
description: Traded sunlight for ink and ancient texts.

name: Scavenger
description: Picking through what others threw away — and finding it was never worthless.

name: Pit Fighter
description: Sold your body to the crowd — and found you liked winning.
